director_partner_human_vs_ai_why: I'd like to think that the partner was a human, but I know with live interactions with other Prolific participants, some people drop out of the study before it ends. This was a long study and there was no safeguard that I saw that would be an "out" in case one person dropped out. The partner did act like a human until the very end when the partner was effusive in praising my descriptions. That one part seemed like AI. Otherwise, my main reason for thinking it was AI was just the survey logistics.
matcher_partner_comment: My partner was so great - I was lucky - the descriptions were great (very detailed), and my partner was patient with me.
